name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.5.0: true byte-preservation via dirty tracking — Reader-loaded NTPU theses survive no-op save_document round-trip with all 13 fontTable entries, 6 distinct headers, 4 footers, three-segment PAGE field, and full <w15:presenceInfo> identity preserved. Closes #23 round-2 (incomplete v3.3.0/v3.4.0 fix), #32 (Header.fileName collapse), #33 (PAGE field detection), #34 (person_id GUID dual identity). Built on ooxml-swift 0.13.0.
